rationale.root_cause: They pinpointed the flaw in CWE416_Use_After_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad where data is freed (line ~34) and then used by printLine(data) (line ~36), explaining the concrete use-after-free mechanism. The function, lines, and dangling-pointer use are correctly identified.
rationale.local_fix: They propose printing before freeing or removing the post-free print, with concrete code edits in the bad function. This directly prevents using the buffer after free.
rationale.global_fix: They recommend RAII with std::unique_ptr and an ownership-transfer API (printLineAndFree), which make lifetime/ownership explicit. These approaches address the root cause by enforcing object lifetime discipline.
